title: Header Fields, Media Types, Negotiation, JSON, and Runtime Validation · Go Client Systems · Go Semantics Case: Field Semantics
summary: An incident collector consumes JSON and compressed text from versioned services with inconsistent media types and one changed schema. Planned artifact: Add and verify the http go field semantics increment in a Go 1.26 net/http representation negotiation and validation boundary. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Handle field names, repeated lines, combination rules, whitespace, size, and hop-by-hop boundaries by specification. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Apply If-Match, If-None-Match, and related preconditions to prevent lost updates and duplicate effects. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
